sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you place an order, including your name, email, and delivery address.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: Your information is used solely to process orders and provide customer support. We do not sell your data to third parties.

sections.title: Cancellations
sections.content: Cancellations made 48 hours before the scheduled pickup/delivery time are eligible for a full refund.

sections.title: Quality Guarantee
sections.content: If you are not satisfied with the quality of your cake, please contact us within 24 hours of receipt with photos of the issue.
